```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
names(optimal_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
optimal_density$density_type="Optimal density"
 
economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_2[,c(1,2,18,19)])
names(economic_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(economic_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
economic_density$density_type="Slope constrained economic density"
 
#cost_economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_long[,c(1,3,4,24,25)])
#names(cost_economic_density)[4] = "plant_density"
#names(cost_economic_density)[5] = "predicted_yield"
#cost_economic_density$density_type="Seed cost constrained economic density"
analysis_type = "Across country"
lm_test_data_2$analysis_type = analysis_type
 
optimal_density_1 = rbind(optimal_density,economic_density)

#Post density curve QC
optimal_density_2 = optimal_density_1 %>% filter(density_type=="Optimal density")

optimal_density_2 = optimal_density_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% mutate(rank_ye=rank(yield_env))

optimal_density_3 = optimal_density_2 %>% group_by(hybrid_name) %>% mutate(min_ye_level=min(rank_ye), max_ye_level=max(rank_ye))

optimal_density_3_min = optimal_density_3 %>% filter(rank_ye==min_ye_level)

optimal_density_3_max = optimal_density_3 %>% filter(rank_ye==max_ye_level)

optimal_density_3_all = rbind(optimal_density_3_min,optimal_density_3_max)

optimal_density_3_all = optimal_density_3_all %>% mutate(opt_density_type = ifelse(rank_ye==1,"min_opt_density","max_opt_density")) %>% dplyr::select(hybrid_name,opt_density_type,plant_density) 

optimal_density_3_all = unique(optimal_density_3_all)

optimal_density_3_all %>%
    spread(opt_density_type, plant_density) %>%
    mutate("Difference" = max_opt_density - min_opt_density) 

optimal_density_3_all_1 = optimal_density_3_all%>% group_by(hybrid_name)%>% tidyr::spread(opt_density_type,plant_density) %>% mutate(difference=max_opt_density-min_opt_density, curve_quality=ifelse(difference>0,"normal","abnormal"))

hybrids = filter(optimal_density_3_all_1,curve_quality=="normal")$hybrid_name

all_parameters_df_1 = inner_join(all_parameters_df,points_data_pmt2_with_ye_for_instinct_summary)

all_parameters_df_1 = filter(all_parameters_df_1,coeff_density_sqr<0)

# defining confidence levels

all_parameters_df_1 = all_parameters_df_1 %>% mutate(two_seasons_tested = ifelse(number_of_seasons>1, "TRUE", "FALSE"), atleast_ten_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=10, "TRUE", "FALSE"),atleast_five_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=5, "TRUE", "FALSE"),atleast_three_locations_tested= ifelse(number_of_locations>=3, "TRUE", "FALSE"))
 
all_parameters_df_1 = all_parameters_df_1 %>% mutate(r2_atleast_0.8 = ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.8, "TRUE", "FALSE"), r2_atleast_0.6= ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.6, "TRUE", "FALSE"),r2_atleast_0.4= ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.4, "TRUE", "FALSE"),r2_atleast_0.2= ifelse(adj_r_2>=0.2, "TRUE", "FALSE"))

confidence_unique_levels = unique(all_parameters_df_1[,c(28:35)])

#write_csv(confidence_unique_levels,"/mnt/data/confidence_unique_levels.csv")

confidence_level_def = read_csv("/mnt/code/confidence__levels_definition_grain_dit (2).csv")

confidence_level_def = confidence_level_def %>% unite(flags_combined, two_seasons_tested,atleast_ten_locations_tested,atleast_five_locations_tested,atleast_three_locations_tested,r2_atleast_0.8,r2_atleast_0.6,r2_atleast_0.4,r2_atleast_0.2, sep="__",remove=F)
confidence_level_def_1 = confidence_level_def[,c(1,10)]
 
#defining confidence levels for hybrids tested for 2 seasons

#two_seasons_tested	atleast_ten_locations_tested	atleast_five_locations_tested	atleast_three_locations_tested	r2_atleast_0.8	r2_atleast_0.6	r2_atleast_0.4	r2_atleast_0.2
#TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	TRUE	Very high

all_parameters_df_1 = all_parameters_df_1 %>% unite(flags_combined, two_seasons_tested,atleast_ten_locations_tested,atleast_five_locations_tested,atleast_three_locations_tested,r2_atleast_0.8,r2_atleast_0.6,r2_atleast_0.4,r2_atleast_0.2, sep="__",remove=F)

all_parameters_df_1 = left_join(all_parameters_df_1,confidence_level_def_1)

hybrids_pos = unique(all_parameters_df_1$hybrid_name)



#all_parameters_df_1_normal = filter(all_parameters_df_1, hybrid_name %in% hybrids)


all_parameters_df_1_normal = filter(all_parameters_df_1, hybrid_name %in% hybrids_pos)
all_parameters_df_1_normal = filter(all_parameters_df_1_normal, hybrid_name %in% hybrids)

lm_test_data_2_normal = filter(lm_test_data_2, hybrid_name %in% hybrids)


#write_csv(lm_test_data_2_normal,"/mnt/field_reports_2025/instinct_results/eme_grain/curves_country/method3_average_per_country_hybrid_per_field_per_field_Instinct_version_2_plotting_data_per_hybrid_for_Spotfire_2024.csv")

#write_csv(all_parameters_df_1_normal,"mnt/field_reports_2025/instinct_results/eme_grain/curves_country/method3_average_per_country_per_hybrid_per_field_per_field_Instinct_version_2_parameters_per_hybrid_perYE_2024.csv")

#write_csv(points_data_pmt2_with_ye_for_instinct_country_summary_me,"/mnt/field_reports_2023/instinct/result_files/Instinct_version_2_countries_per_me_27thFeb2023.csv")



optimal_density_1_normal = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name %in% hybrids)

optimal_density_1_normal$crop = "Corn-Grain"

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6846XKL1","EW6846XKLZ","EW6015XKLZ","EW6436XKLZ")

optimal_density_1_normal = optimal_density_1_normal %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "Smart corn", "Tall hybrid"))


#points_data_pmt2_with_ye_for_instinct_summary$hybrid_type = "PS4 Conventional-tall"
optimal_density_1_normal$trait = "grain_yield"
optimal_density_1_normal$trial_type = "Geo-spatial large plot DIT trials"
optimal_density_1_normal$region = "EME"



#hybrids = unique(lm_test_data_2$hybrid_name)

for(i in 1:length(hybrids)){
  print(hybrids[i])
  
  data = filter(lm_test_data_2, hybrid_name==hybrids[i])
opt_data = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name==hybrids[i])
summary_data = filter(all_parameters_df_1,hybrid_name==hybrids[i])
 
plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=as.factor(yield_env))) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=as.factor(yield_env)))+ggtitle(paste(hybrids[i],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+geom_point(data=opt_data,aes(x=plant_density,y=predicted_yield,shape=density_type),size=3)+xlab("Planting Density (1K seeds/ha)")+scale_x_continuous(limits = c(80, 160))+ylab("Dry Yield (t/ha)")+labs(title = paste("Hybrid = ", hybrids[i],"; ","Seasons = ",summary_data$number_of_seasons,"; ","locations = ",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots = ", summary_data$number_of_plots,"; ","points = ", summary_data$number_of_points,"; ","Adj R2 = ",round(data$adj_r_2[1],2),"; ","Conf level = ",summary_data$confidence_level,sep=""))+ggsave(paste("/mnt/field_reports_2025/instinct_results/eme_grain/curves_country/curves/",hybrids[i], "_","INSTINCT_density_curve",".pdf",sep=""), width = 25, height = 20, units = "cm")


#print(plot_model_1)
  
}

#function for intinct version 2 plotting

plot_yield_density_curve_for_grain_instinct = function(plot_data,opt_data,summary_data){

plot_model_1=ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=as.factor(yield_env))) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=as.factor(yield_env)))+ggtitle(paste(hybrids[i],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~summary_data$hybrid_name)+geom_point(data=opt_data,aes(x=plant_density,y=predicted_yield,shape=density_type),size=3)+xlab("Planting Density (1K seeds/ha)")+ylab("Dry Yield (t/ha)")+labs(title = paste("Hybrid = ", hybrids[i],"; ","Seasons = ",summary_data$number_of_seasons,"; ","locations = ",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots = ", summary_data$number_of_plots,"; ","points = ", summary_data$number_of_points,"; ","Adj R2 = ",round(data$adj_r_2[1],2),"; ","Confidence level = ",summary_data$confidence_level,sep=""))

}

#function for gettting the optimal densitties

get_optimal_economic_densities_grain_instinct = function(plot_data){
  optimal_density = unique(lm_test_data_2[,c(1,2,16,17)])
names(optimal_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(optimal_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
optimal_density$density_type="Optimal density"
 
economic_density = unique(lm_test_data_2[,c(1,2,18,19)])
names(economic_density)[3] = "plant_density"
names(economic_density)[4] = "predicted_yield"
economic_density$density_type="Slope constrained economic density"
#lm_test_data_2$analysis_type = analysis_type
 
opt_data = rbind(optimal_density,economic_density)
return(opt_data)
}

#calculate the optimal and eco density 

calculate_optimal_economic_density_grain_instinct = function(lm_test_data_1){
  lm_test_data_2 = lm_test_data_1 %>% mutate(optimal_density = -(coeff_density+yield_env*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),
    yld_max = intercept + coeff_density*optimal_density + coeff_density_sqr*optimal_density^2+coeff_ye*yield_env+coeff_ye_density*yield_env*optimal_density,economic_density = (-1)*(coeff_density-0.023+yield_env*coeff_ye_density)/(2*coeff_density_sqr),yld_eco = intercept + coeff_density*economic_density + coeff_density_sqr*economic_density^2+coeff_ye*yield_env+coeff_ye_density*yield_env*economic_density)
  return(lm_test_data_2)
}

#generate the plot data for grain instinct
generate_data_for_plotting_grain_instinct = function(all_parameters_df_1){
  hybrids = unique(all_parameters_df_1$hybrid_name)
  hyd.len = length(hybrids)
final.bin1.table = NULL
for(i in sequence(hyd.len)){
  #temp = data.hy.sub %>% filter(Hybrid==hybrids[i])
  temp = all_parameters_df_1 %>% filter(hybrid_name==hybrids[i])
  YE = seq(temp$round_min_ye,temp$round_max_ye,1)
  #### Made the following change to keep the yield range same as Joo Yoon 3T/Ha to 20T/Ha, commented the previous line
  #YE = seq(3,20,1)
  bin1_table = temp
  for(j in 1:(length(YE)-1)){
    bin1_table = rbind(bin1_table,temp)
  }
  bin1_table$YE = YE
  final.bin1.table = rbind(final.bin1.table,bin1_table)
}

lm_test_data = final.bin1.table[,c(1,38)]

lm_test_data_1= lm_test_data%>% crossing(plant_density = seq(40,160,1))

names(lm_test_data_1)[2] = "yield_env"
#lm_test_data_long = lm_test_data %>% gather(ye_level,mean_field_yield, 2:3)

lm_test_data_1 = inner_join(lm_test_data_1,all_parameters_df)
 
#lm_test_data_long$predicted_yield=predict(model_lm,lm_test_data_long)
 
plot_data = lm_test_data_1 %>% mutate(predicted_yield=intercept+coeff_density*plant_density+coeff_density_sqr*plant_density*plant_density+coeff_ye*yield_env+coeff_ye_density*yield_env*plant_density)

plot_data = calculate_optimal_economic_density_grain_instinct(plot_data)
return(plot_data)
}


##not normal density curves
hybrids_weird = filter(optimal_density_3_all_1,!curve_quality=="normal")$hybrid_name

for(i in 1:length(hybrids_weird)){
  print(hybrids_weird[i])
  
  data = filter(lm_test_data_2, hybrid_name==hybrids_weird[i])
opt_data = filter(optimal_density_1, hybrid_name==hybrids_weird[i])
summary_data = filter(all_parameters_df_1,hybrid_name==hybrids_weird[i])
 
plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=as.factor(yield_env))) +
  geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=as.factor(yield_env)))+ggtitle(paste(hybrids[i],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+geom_point(data=opt_data,aes(x=plant_density,y=predicted_yield,shape=density_type),size=3)+xlab("Planting Density (1K seeds/ha)")+scale_x_continuous(limits = c(80, 160))+ylab("Dry Yield (t/ha)")+labs(title = paste("Hybrid = ", hybrids_weird[i],"; ","Seasons = ",summary_data$number_of_seasons,"; ","locations = ",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots = ", summary_data$number_of_plots,"; ","points = ", summary_data$number_of_points,"; ","Adj R2 = ",round(data$adj_r_2[1],2),"; ","Conf level = ",summary_data$confidence_level,sep=""))+ggsave(paste("/mnt/field_reports_2025/instinct_results/eme_grain/curves_country/not_normal_curves/",hybrids_weird[i], "_","INSTINCT_density_curve",".pdf",sep=""), width = 25, height = 20, units = "cm")


#print(plot_model_1)
  
}

#for EW6934,EV3077

#for EW6934,EV3077
 plot_model_1=ggplot(data, aes(x = plant_density, y = predicted_yield, color=as.factor(yield_env))) +
   geom_line( aes(x=plant_density, y=predicted_yield,color=as.factor(yield_env)))+ggtitle(paste(data$hybrid_name[1],"- Density curve",sep=""))+facet_wrap(~hybrid_name)+xlab("Planting Density (1K seeds/ha)")+ylab("Dry Yield (t/ha)")+
  labs(title = paste("Hybrid =", data$hybrid_name[1],";","Analysis= Across EME",";","locations=",summary_data$number_of_locations,";","plots =", summary_data$number_of_plots,";","points =", summary_data$number_of_points,";","Adj R2 = ",round(data$adj_r_2[1],3),sep=" "))
# 
# 
 #print(plot_model_1)
 

#write_csv(instinct_data_2018_2020_pmt2,"/mnt/data/instinct_data_2018_2020_pmt2_priorities.csv")


flexibility_df = data.frame()

no_flex_hybrids = c("DKC3623","DKC5209","EW6755","DKC4125", "DKC4391","EW2711","EX4571","EY6940XKL1_italy","EY5325_spain")
#no_flex_hybrids = c("DKC3623")

fit_non_linear_reciprocal_equation = function(density_data){
  mi <- nls(predicted_yield ~ plant_density / (a + b * plant_density), data=density_data, start=list(a=10,b=1))
  return(mi)
}

#Function for calculating the flexibility value per hybrid per yield env
calculate_flexibility_values_using_non_linear_reciprocal_equation = function(model){
  
  #dati <- dplyr::filter(density_data, yield_env == g)
 # mi <- nls(dry_yield_t_ha ~ plant_density / (a + b * plant_density), data=model_data, start=list(a=10,b=1))
  #print(summary(mi))
  
  out <- model$m$getPars()
  #out$actual_yield_environment_class = g
  
  pred <- predict(model)
  n <- length(pred)
  res <- resid(model)
  w <- weights(model)
  if (is.null(w)) w <- rep(1, n)
  rss <- sum(w * res ^ 2)
  resp <- pred + res
  center <- weighted.mean(resp, w)
  r.df <- summary(model)$df[2]
  int.df <- 1
  tss <- sum(w * (resp - center)^2)
  r.sq <- 1 - rss/tss
  adj.r.sq <- 1 - (1 - r.sq) * (n - int.df) / r.df
  
  out$pseudo.R.squared=r.sq
  out$adj.r.sq=adj.r.sq
  out=as.data.frame(out)
  out  = mutate(out , flexibility = a/b)
  return(out)
}

model = fit_non_linear_reciprocal_equation(lm_test_data_2)
model_results = calculate_flexibility_values_using_non_linear_reciprocal_equation(model)
 
 #hybrids=c( "EV4559" , "DKC4010" ,"EV4736")
for(i in 1:length(hybrids)){
  g=hybrids[i]
  print(g)
  if (!g %in% no_flex_hybrids){
  dati <- dplyr::filter(lm_test_data_2, hybrid_name == g)
  ye_levels = unique(dati$yield_env)
  yield_levels_df = data.frame()
  for(j in 1:length(ye_levels)){
  h=ye_levels[j]
  dati_1 <- dplyr::filter(dati, yield_env == h)
  mi <- nls(predicted_yield ~ plant_density / (a + b * plant_density), data=dati_1, start=list(a=10,b=1),nls.control(maxiter = 1000, tol = 1e-05, minFactor = 1/2048,
            printEval = FALSE, warnOnly = FALSE))
  #print(summary(mi))
  out <- mi$m$getPars()
  out$hybrid_name = g
  out$ye_level = h
  out=as.data.frame(out)
  pred <- predict(mi)
  n <- length(pred)
  res <- resid(mi)
  w <- weights(mi)
  if (is.null(w)) w <- rep(1, n)
  rss <- sum(w * res ^ 2)
  resp <- pred + res
  center <- weighted.mean(resp, w)
  r.df <- summary(mi)$df[2]
  int.df <- 1
  tss <- sum(w * (resp - center)^2)
  r.sq <- 1 - rss/tss
  adj.r.sq <- 1 - (1 - r.sq) * (n - int.df) / r.df
  out$pseudo.R.squared=r.sq
  out$adj.r.sq=adj.r.sq
  yield_levels_df  = rbind(yield_levels_df ,out)
  }
  flexibility_df  = rbind(flexibility_df ,yield_levels_df)
  }
}

flexibility_df$overall_flexibility=model_results$flexibility
 
flexibility_df  = mutate(flexibility_df , flexibility = a/b, normalized_flexibility= flexibility/overall_flexibility, rounded_norm_flex= round(normalized_flexibility,0))


 
flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(flexibility_class = ifelse(flexibility<=(-10),"1:Strong flex",ifelse(flexibility>-10 & flexibility<=(0),"2:More flex",ifelse(flexibility>0 & flexibility<=10 ,"3:Average",ifelse(flexibility>10 & flexibility<=20 ,"4:More fix",ifelse(flexibility>20,"5:Strong fix","NA"))))))


#instinct_data_model_parameters_grain_ssc = instinct_data_model_parameters_grain_ssc %>% mutate(confidence_level_density = ifelse(pvalue_density_coeff <0.05 & pvalue_density_sqr_coeff <0.05, "High",ifelse(pvalue_density_coeff %in% c(0.01:0.05) & pvalue_density_sqr_coeff %in% c(0.01:0.05),"Medium","Low")))

 flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(adj.r.sq = ifelse(adj.r.sq>0,adj.r.sq,pseudo.R.squared))

flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(rsquared_greater_0.6=ifelse(adj.r.sq>0.6,"TRUE","FALSE"))
flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(rsquared_greater_0.3=ifelse(adj.r.sq>0.3,"TRUE","FALSE"))


flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(confidence_level_flexibility = ifelse(rsquared_greater_0.6 == "TRUE" , "High",ifelse(rsquared_greater_0.6 == "FALSE" & rsquared_greater_0.3 == "TRUE", "Medium", "Low")))

flexibility_df$crop = "Corn-Grain"

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6846XKL1","EW6846XKLZ","EW6015XKLZ","EW6436XKLZ")

flexibility_df = flexibility_df %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "Smart corn", "Tall hybrid"))


#points_data_pmt2_with_ye_for_instinct_summary$hybrid_type = "PS4 Conventional-tall"
flexibility_df$trait = "grain_yield"
flexibility_df$trial_type = "Geo-spatial large plot DIT trials"
flexibility_df$region = "EME"



#exclude EW4736, EV4042, EW3295, EW3411, EW4736

#after a spotfire QC of the curves:
post_spotfire_qc = c("EW4736","EV4042","EW3295","EW3411","EW4736")

flexibility_df_final = filter(flexibility_df, !hybrid_name %in% post_spotfire_qc)
optimal_density_1_normal_final = filter(optimal_density_1_normal, !hybrid_name %in% post_spotfire_qc)
all_parameters_df_1_normal_final = filter(all_parameters_df_1_normal, !hybrid_name %in% post_spotfire_qc)
#points_data_pmt2_with_ye_for_instinct_country_summary_final = filter(points_data_pmt2_with_ye_for_instinct_country_summary, !hybrid_name %in% post_spotfire_qc)

write_csv(flexibility_df_final,"/mnt/field_reports_2025/instinct_results/eme_grain/curves_country/method3_average_per_hybrid_per_field_per_country_grain_results_flexibility_predictions_grain_2025.csv")
#dkc6492, dkc3088,dkc3719


write_csv(optimal_density_1_normal_final,"/mnt/field_reports_2025/instinct_results/eme_grain/curves_country/method3_average_per_country_per_hybrid_per_field_per_field_grain_results_optimal_densities_grain_2025.csv")

all_parameters_df_1_normal_final = all_parameters_df_1_normal_final %>% mutate(confidence_level = ifelse(is.na(confidence_level),"low",confidence_level))



all_parameters_df_1_normal_final$hybrid_country = all_parameters_df_1_normal_final$hybrid_name
all_parameters_df_1_normal_final$hybrid_name= NULL

all_parameters_df_1_normal_final = all_parameters_df_1_normal_final %>% separate(hybrid_country , into=c("hybrid_name","country"),sep="_")

all_parameters_df_1_normal_final = all_parameters_df_1_normal_final %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "Smart corn", "Tall hybrid"))

all_parameters_df_1_normal_final$analysis_type = analysis_type

write_csv(all_parameters_df_1_normal_final,"/mnt/field_reports_2025/instinct_results/eme_grain/curves_country/method3_average_per_country_per_hybrid_per_field_per_field_grain_results_model_paramters_grain_2025.csv")

#write_csv(points_data_pmt2_with_ye_for_instinct_country_summary_final,"/mnt/field_reports_2022/instinct_version_2_density_curves/instinct_2_results/grain_results_country_megaenv_grain_2ndMar2023")

```
